meta.title: Lead generation systems for mortgage brokers — a predictable flow of qualified clients
meta.description: We build a high-converting funnel and acquisition system for mortgage brokers: mortgage, refinancing and home-loan clients who are ready to close. Meta Ads, Google Ads, qualification and lead nurturing.

hero.eyebrow: Done-for-you client system · Ads · Filtering · Follow-up
hero.subheadline: We build and run a complete system that brings you people who actually want a mortgage and are ready to close — not payday-loan seekers or tire-kickers. You don't have to learn marketing or touch a single ad. We handle everything; you just talk to the clients we send you.

problem.eyebrow: Why most mortgage brokers stay stuck
problem.title: Good clients arrive by chance. Bad inquiries arrive constantly.
problem.body: You know how to close a mortgage. What you don't have is a reliable way to get ready-to-buy clients in front of you every week. Most brokers don't lose deals because their offer is weak — they lose them because nothing steadily attracts and filters the right people.

items.title: Unpredictable flow of clients
items.body: Some weeks the phone rings, some weeks it's silent. There's no switch you can turn up when you want more deals.

items.title: Wrong people calling
items.body: Low credit scores, payday-loan seekers, no down payment — hours wasted on people who will never get approved.

items.title: Relying only on referrals and banks
items.body: Word of mouth and bank desks are great until they dry up. You have no second channel that you control.

items.title: Money lost on ads that don't work
items.body: A boosted Facebook post that just shows your phone number — no clear next step, no way to know what's working, no follow-up. Money down the drain.

solution.eyebrow: What we actually build for you
solution.title: Attract, filter, follow up, close — one simple system.
solution.body: In plain terms: we put your offer in front of the right people, weed out the ones who aren't ready, gently follow up with the rest, and hand you the clients worth your time. Here are the three steps.

steps.label: Attract
steps.title: Ads that reach the right people
steps.body: We run paid ads on Facebook, Instagram and Google aimed only at people who are likely to want a mortgage — using images, short videos and headlines we test and improve over time.

steps.label: Filter
steps.title: A page that sorts the serious buyers
steps.body: Clicking the ad takes them to a simple web page (a "landing page") with a short form. It quietly separates the ready, well-prepared people from the rest — before they ever reach you.

steps.label: Close
steps.title: Follow-up that turns leads into deals
steps.body: We automatically follow up by email and SMS, remind interested people with more ads, and share helpful info — so they trust you and are warm by the time you speak.

qualification.title: We only send you clients worth your time.
qualification.body: Every inquiry is automatically checked and sorted by how ready the person is — so your hours go to deals that can actually close, and the rest never lands on your desk.
target: Want to refinance an existing loan
qualification.tiersTitle: Every inquiry, automatically sorted into three groups

caseStudies.title: Systems we've built, and the results they produced.
caseStudies.body: Real numbers from systems we've built for clients in other industries — the exact same approach we'll use for your mortgage business.

items.note: We built the website, the step-by-step sales path and the blog. They spent €4,530 on ads and earned far more back.
150 rental + 50 owner deals. €12,467 spent on ads, profit shared 50/50 with us.
Website, sales path and an automatic booking process. €2,460 on ads — the rest was profit.

testimonials.title: Businesses that stopped relying on luck.
testimonials.body: Different industries, the same system underneath — the one we'll build for your mortgage business.

items.name: Bio Empire
items.quote: They built the website, the sales path and the blog from scratch. 800 customers and €24k in revenue later, we finally have a real system instead of guessing.

items.name: Real-estate agency
items.quote: 200 closed deals in eight months and a steady stream of clients we can plan around. The filtering meant we only spent time on people who were actually ready to move.

items.name: Personal coach
items.quote: 25 new clients and €11.7k in three months from a process that runs by itself. Now I only talk to people who are ready — that changed everything.

offer.title: We do everything. You just close the deals.
offer.body: You don't need to understand ads, websites or technology. Our team builds and runs all of it for you. Here's everything that's included — in plain language.

modules.title: Your client-getting website
modules.body: A modern web page built for one job: turning visitors into mortgage inquiries — with a simple form, trust elements and a clear next step.

modules.title: We run your ads daily
modules.body: We set up and manage your ads on Facebook, Instagram and Google every day — watching the budget, testing what works and putting more behind the winners.

modules.title: Ads designed to grab attention
modules.body: Images, short videos and wording (the actual ads people see) made to stop the scroll — plus reminder ads for people who already showed interest.

modules.title: We filter every inquiry
modules.body: An automatic process sorts every person who reaches out into high, medium or low priority, so you only spend time on the good ones.

modules.title: Automatic follow-up
modules.body: We keep people interested for you with automatic emails, text messages, reminder ads and helpful content — so they're warm when you call.

modules.title: All your leads in one place
modules.body: Every inquiry is captured and organized in one simple system, so nothing slips through the cracks and you always know who to call next.

process.title: How we get started — 4 easy steps

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: We plan together
steps.body: On one call we map your offer, your ideal client and who we want to reach.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: We build it
steps.body: We set up the website, the form, the follow-up messages and the system — you don't lift a finger.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: We launch the ads
steps.body: Your ads go live on Facebook, Instagram and Google and the first inquiries start coming in.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: We improve it daily
steps.body: We turn off what doesn't work and spend more on what does — so results keep getting better.

pricing.title: Two ways to start — and we win only when you win.
pricing.body: The full system is normally worth €1,500 (€1,000 to build and run it, plus €500 of ad budget). But instead of charging you full price, we'd rather share the results with you. Pick the option that feels right.
pricing.valueNote: Real value €1,500 · €1,000 build & management + €500 ad budget

variants.title: You cover the start, then we split every deal 50/50
points: €500 goes straight to the ad platforms (your budget)
€500 goes to us to build and run everything
After that, every closed deal is split 50/50
That's half our normal price — we cut it because we're confident we'll bring real results

variants.title: We take all the risk — you pay nothing to start
points: We pay for the ads ourselves
We build the entire system at our own cost
We launch the whole project at our own risk
Once deals start, the first earnings repay our €1,000 work + €500 ad budget
After that, profit is shared: 75% to us / 25% to you — because we carried all the upfront risk

pricing.guaranteeTitle: Why this is completely safe for you
pricing.guarantee: With Option 2 you don't pay a single cent until the system has actually made you money. We put our own time and budget on the line first.
reassure: Everything we build — website, ads, your list of leads — stays yours, forever.
You don't need any marketing knowledge. We handle all the technical work.
We share the risk with you instead of taking a big fee and disappearing.
You'll always know what's happening — clear, simple updates, no jargon.
pricing.roiTitle: What just one client can mean for you
pricing.roiBody: A typical mortgage deal is around €100,000.

roi.v: Your whole investment is paid back
A steady, highly profitable stream of clients

pricing.close: The truth is simple: it only takes one mortgage deal to make this pay for itself — and the system is built to bring you many more. With Option 2 there's nothing to lose, because you only pay once it works. Let's build it.

items.a: The full system is worth €1,500 (€1,000 to build and run it + €500 of ad budget). You have two options: Option 1 — you start with €1,000 and we split every deal 50/50; Option 2 — you pay nothing upfront, we cover everything ourselves, and we only share the profit (75% us / 25% you) after the first earnings repay our costs.

items.q: What kind of clients will you bring me?
items.a: Only good ones: people who want a mortgage, are buying or refinancing, have decent credit, a stable income and a down payment, and are ready for a real deal. We deliberately keep out payday-loan seekers, very low credit scores and people who clearly aren't ready.

items.q: I don't know anything about marketing — is that a problem?
items.a: Not at all. That's exactly why we exist. You don't need to run ads, build a website or learn any tools. We do all of it and simply hand you the qualified clients. You just do what you already do best: close the deal.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: The first inquiries usually come in within the first weeks. A steady, predictable flow settles in once we've gathered enough data to fine-tune the ads — usually within a month or so.

items.q: Who owns the website, ads and list of clients?
items.a: You do — always. We build everything inside your own accounts. If we ever stop working together, all of it stays with you.
On Facebook, Instagram and Google. We manage and improve them every day, and we also show reminder ads to people who already clicked but haven't reached out yet.

finalCta.title: A steady flow of mortgage clients starts with one call.
finalCta.body: Book a free 30-minute call. We'll map your offer, your ideal client and the fastest path to a full pipeline — and you'll leave with a clear plan whether you work with us or not. No pressure, no risk.
finalCta.trust: No slides. No hard sell. Just a clear plan you can keep.

leadForm.title: Get your free plan for more mortgage clients
leadForm.body: Tell us a little about your business. Within 24 hours we'll send you a clear, simple plan for getting a steady flow of qualified mortgage clients. No cost, no obligation.

fields.name: Full name
fields.monthlyRevenue: Roughly how much you earn per month
fields.monthlyAdSpend: How much you spend on ads now (if any)
fields.biggestBottleneck: Your biggest struggle in getting clients right now

leadForm.success: Got it! Your plan is on the way within 24 hours.
leadForm.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at hello@newagecontent.com.
leadForm.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your free plan. No spam, ever.

booking.title: Or book the call directly
booking.body: Pick a 30-minute slot that suits you. It's a free, friendly chat — no slides, no hard sell.
booking.fallback: Booking isn't connected yet. Use the form on this page or email hello@newagecontent.com to book your call.
